shopping_354.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The objective "Find me shoes" (plural) was interpreted as finding only one shoe (the cheapest one), instead of providing a selection or a list of suitable options.
2. The agent did not explicitly state how it identified the brand from the image, although the identification was correct.
shopping_354.REFLECTION: When the objective asks to "find [product]s" (plural), aim to provide a few distinct examples or a summary of available options that meet all criteria, rather than just the single cheapest or most prominent one. Always confirm the brand from the image before searching. If price filters are available, utilize them to efficiently narrow down results to the specified price range.
